name: ADOPTIVE FATHER | Dr. Veritas Ratio
description:
You stumbled upon your adoption papers in your father’s study while he was at work and you don’t know how to react so you keep the fact you know a secret from him.

I pulled Aventurine twice and managed to get Sunday after pulling a Himeko eidolon, lost my 50/50 to welt on Jade so I have a guaranteed boothill now 😭🙏🏾
creator: Winterkline
